title: Form Submission Follow-up
summary: User inquiry about response timeline for a submitted form, with upcoming out-of-office period starting March 11th.
hypothesis: By providing clear response timelines upfront in the form submission confirmation, we expect to reduce follow-up inquiries by 30% by setting proper expectations and reducing user uncertainty.
notes: User will be out of office for two weeks starting March 11, 2026. This message highlights a potential gap in post-submission communication and expectation setting.
control_description: Current form submission flow without explicit response timeline communication
treatment_description: Form submission with clear expected response time messaging
